meta.title: Home
meta.description: MMTUK is an independent research organisation producing evidence-based economic analysis informed by Modern Monetary Theory. Explore our articles, education resources and community.

hero.heading: Driving Economic Change
hero.tagline: MMTUK is an independent research organisation dedicated to producing high-quality, evidence-based analysis informed by Modern Monetary Theory (MMT).

slides.text: A Counter-Inflationary Job Guarantee for the UK — now published
slides.link_label: A Counter-Inflationary Job Guarantee for the UK

image.alt: A Counter-Inflationary Job Guarantee for the UK

slides.text: Courses and workshops equipping citizens and leaders with modern money literacy skills.
Events, collaborations, and campaigns connecting research with real community priorities across Britain.

research_section.heading: Academic Research
research_section.description: Strategic research and targeted advocacy to transform Britain's economic landscape through innovative policy frameworks

cards.heading: The Job Guarantee
cards.body: Our UK-focused proposal is in advanced draft form. It demonstrates how MMT can achieve full employment and price stability.

cards.heading: Zero Interest Rate Policy (ZIRP)
cards.body: A UK framework for a standing 0% policy rate, with fiscal stabilisers managing demand and prices.

education_section.heading: Education & Training
education_section.description: Explore our library and briefings for clear, practical guides to UK macro-economic policy.

cards.heading: The MMTUK library
cards.body: Searchable library of papers, podcasts, articles and more on economics through the lens of MMT.

cards.heading: Our Briefings
cards.body: Concise briefings from MMTUK and our guests explaining UK macro policy with practical, actionable insights.

community_section.heading: Community & Network
community_section.description: Connect with other people interested in MMT by joining local groups, public events and active online discussions.

cards.heading: Local Groups
cards.body: Join or start local MMT groups, supported and connected nationwide.

cards.heading: Events
cards.body: Join talks, workshops, and conferences we host and attend nationwide.

cards.heading: Online
cards.body: Debate, learn, and organise together in our moderated online community.

items.quote: MMTUK turns complex monetary operations into plain English, empowering people to see policy choices clearly and demand better, more humane economics.
items.name: Patricia Pino
items.title: Executive Director & Academic Researcher, MMTUK

items.quote: A rare mix of heterodox depth and public pedagogy. MMTUK elevates debate and equips citizens to challenge harmful myths.
items.name: Dr Phil Armstrong
items.title: Founder, MMTUK

items.quote: MMTUK marries rigorous scholarship with practical organising. It's a hub where democratic priorities and monetary reality finally meet.
items.name: Dr David Merrill
items.title: Founder, MMTUK

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.tagline: Be part of the economic transformation that challenges conventional thinking and drives meaningful policy change
